name: Spicy Chicken with Peach Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Peach Chutney. Cut each chicken breast into half pieces.
2. Arrange the chicken, skin sides up and thickest parts to outside edges, in a rectangular microwavable dish (11 x 7 x 3/4 inches).
3. Sprinkle with onions and bouillon granules. Cover with waxed paper.
4. Microwave on high for 16 to 20 minutes, rotating the dish 1/2 turn after 10 minutes, until thickest pieces of chicken are done.
5. Remove chicken to a serving dish; keep warm.
6. Pour liquid from the rectangular dish into a bowl and skim off fat. Return about 1/4 cup liquid to the rectangular dish.
7. Stir in sour cream, curry powder, salt, ginger, and cumin. Microwave uncovered on medium (50%) for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring every minute, until hot.
8. Spoon sauce over chicken. Sprinkle with parsley.
9. Serve with chutney and rice. Makes 6 servings.
